![Custom Iframe Builder Walkthrough](customiframebuilder.clip.gif)

<p align="center">
  <i>A developer utility for generating, previewing, and exporting responsive custom iframe configurations.</i>
</p>

## 📖 Overview

The Custom Iframe Builder resolves the challenge of scaling and cropping external embeds inside Obsidian canvas environments. By automating aspect-ratio detection and scaling layouts, it makes external platform URLs render seamlessly. The component runs locally under a sandboxed runtime, providing fine-tuning dimensions and quick-copy presets for seamless dashboard integration.

---

## ✨ Features

The builder integrates highly stylized controls and presets across three core functional domains:

### 🛡️ Runtime & Agentic Safety
*   **Sandboxed Environment**: Operates entirely in a sandboxed client-side runtime, making it highly secure and lightweight.
*   **Zero-Dependency Logic**: Eliminates external server-side compilers or build dependencies.
*   **Active Containment**: Isolates iframe instances inside a structured wrapper to prevent host-level scripting leaks.

### 🔐 Security & Integrations
*   **Secure Config Handling**: Implements clean serialization schemas to import and export settings via standard clipboard actions, without physical vault write requirements.
*   **Cross-Origin Isolation**: Applies strict pointer bounds and wrapper-level masking to safely isolate third-party DOM processes.
*   **CSS Bleed Isolation**: Restricts container and frame selectors to prevent styles from interfering with Obsidian’s root themes.

### 📐 User Interface & Developer Loop
*   **Platform Guidelines Presets**: Instant auto-tuning configurations for major platforms including YouTube (Standard & Shorts), TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Warpcast, Snapchat, Reddit, and LinkedIn.
*   **Interactive Lock System**: A dedicated overlay switch allows developers to lock click-through interactions, enabling active bounding box dragging and scaling without triggering video player controls.
*   **Fine-Tuning Bounding**: Granular controls to manually scale, position (X/Y offsets), and crop dimensions in real-time.
*   **Adaptive Layout Support**: Toggle full-tab distraction-free workspace mode or render compact inlines.

---

## 📦 Directory Index & Components

The package exposes the following compiled files:

| File | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **[CUSTOM IFRAME BUILDER.md](CUSTOM%20IFRAME%20BUILDER.md)** | The main entry point designed to be loaded inside Obsidian canvases or workspace leaves. |
| **[CustomIframeBuilder.component.jsx](CustomIframeBuilder.component.jsx)** | Standardized React component implementing the builder view and UI controls. |
| **[guidelines.js](guidelines.js)** | Platform-specific dimension and scaling preset definitions. |
| **[METADATA.md](_RESOURCES/DATACORE/_DONE/CUSTOM%20IFRAME%20BUILDER/METADATA.md)** | Packaging manifest outlining indexing, target, and security configurations. |
| **[CONTRIBUTION.md](_RESOURCES/DATACORE/_DONE/CUSTOM%20IFRAME%20BUILDER/CONTRIBUTION.md)** | Contributor architecture standards and local compilation guidelines. |
| **[LICENSE.md](_RESOURCES/DATACORE/_DONE/CUSTOM%20IFRAME%20BUILDER/LICENSE.md)** | MIT open-source license. |
